title.purpose: Wordmark and modal titles; the system has no display tier.

label.purpose: Uppercase 1.2px-tracked section headers — the panel's structural voice.

data.purpose: Every numeric readout: mono, tabular-nums (The Mono Numerals Rule).

shadows.name: preview-ambient
shadows.purpose: The single shadow in the system — under the floating 3D preview only (The Glass Over Shadow Rule).

breakpoints.name: panel-hide
breakpoints.purpose: Below this the settings panel is hidden; the app is desktop-first.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The one blue action per view region — Generate, Apply, Go.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; gap:6px; padding:7px 14px; border:1px solid #4D9FFF; border-radius:4px; background:#4D9FFF; color:#000; font:600 13px -apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,'Segoe UI',sans-serif; cursor:pointer; transition:background 150ms, border-color 150ms; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background:#70B3FF; border-color:#70B3FF; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline:1px solid rgba(77,159,255,0.5); outline-offset:2px; }

components.name: Standard Button
components.description: Quiet glass-surface button for secondary actions.
components.css: .ds-btn { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; gap:6px; padding:7px 14px; border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.14); border-radius:4px; background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04); color:#E8ECF0; font:500 13px -apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,'Segoe UI',sans-serif; cursor:pointer; transition:background 150ms, border-color 150ms; } .ds-btn:hover { background:rgba(255,255,255,0.08); border-color:rgba(255,255,255,0.22); } .ds-btn:focus-visible { outline:1px solid rgba(77,159,255,0.5); outline-offset:2px; }

components.name: Danger Button
components.description: Destructive action: colored border + text, transparent fill.
components.css: .ds-btn-danger { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; padding:5px 10px; border:1px solid rgba(248,81,73,0.35); border-radius:4px; background:transparent; color:#F85149; font:500 12px -apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,'Segoe UI',sans-serif; cursor:pointer; transition:background 150ms; } .ds-btn-danger:hover { background:rgba(248,81,73,0.10); }

components.name: Number Input
components.description: Numeric field in the data font with tabular numerals.
components.css: .ds-input-number { width:100px; padding:6px 10px; background:rgba(0,0,0,0.45); border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.07); border-radius:4px; color:#E8ECF0; font:400 12px ui-monospace,'SF Mono',Menlo,monospace; font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums; outline:none; transition:border-color 150ms; } .ds-input-number:focus { border-color:rgba(77,159,255,0.5); }

components.name: Section Header
components.description: Accordion row: uppercase tracked label + rotating chevron.
components.css: .ds-section-head { display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between; padding:11px 14px 10px; font:600 10px -apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,'Segoe UI',sans-serif; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:1.2px; color:#8B959E; border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.07); cursor:pointer; user-select:none; } .ds-section-head:hover { color:#E8ECF0; } .ds-chev { font-size:9px; color:#565F67; transition:transform 150ms; }

components.name: Range Row
components.description: Slider + right-aligned mono value chip — the panel's most common control.
components.html: 2×
components.css: .ds-range-row { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px; width:240px; } .ds-range-row input[type=range] { flex:1; accent-color:#4D9FFF; } .ds-range-val { min-width:44px; text-align:right; font:400 11px ui-monospace,'SF Mono',Menlo,monospace; font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums; color:#8B959E; }

narrative.overview: A dark surface with the living map shining through translucent overlays. Every piece of chrome — the settings column, the search bar, the 3D preview — is tracing film laid over the light table: blurred glass, hairline edges, quiet gray ink. The terrain is the only thing allowed to be colorful; the interface's job is to disappear into the task, the way a slicer's viewport chrome disappears around the model. The system is dense and trustworthy in the manner of OrcaSlicer/Bambu Studio: many controls visible, tightly packed, every one labeled and predictable. It explicitly rejects the vibe-coded AI aesthetic — big radii, glows, gradient text, pill buttons — and anything toy-like or gamified. Familiarity is the feature; strangeness without purpose is the failure mode.
keyCharacteristics: Full-bleed map with floating translucent glass chrome (blur 14–18px, saturate 1.15)
Monochrome interface; color is reserved for data (terrain) and function (Signal Blue)
Sharp 4px radii, hairline 1px borders at 7–14% white
Monospace tabular numerals on every numeric readout
Accordion-organized dense control panel, mode-driven visibility

rules.name: The Functional Blue Rule
rules.body: Signal Blue appears only where it means action, focus, or active state. If removing the blue wouldn't remove information, it shouldn't be blue.

rules.name: The Hairline Rule
rules.body: Borders are 1px white-alpha hairlines. No colored borders, no 2px+ accents, no side-stripes.

rules.name: The Mono Numerals Rule
rules.body: Any value a user might compare or re-read (mm, meters, counts, sizes) renders in the data font with tabular numerals. A proportional numeral in a readout is a bug.

rules.name: The Glass Over Shadow Rule
rules.body: To lift a surface, increase its glass opacity and blur — never add a drop shadow. If a new surface needs a shadow to read, its glass values are wrong.

dos: Do keep the terrain the hero: chrome stays monochrome glass; only data and function get color.
Do use monospace tabular numerals for every readout (The Mono Numerals Rule).
Do hold radii at 4px (6px only for floating containers) and borders at 1px hairlines.
Do keep state transitions 150–250ms, easing out; motion conveys state, never decoration.
Do show only applicable settings — mode-driven visibility over disabled clutter.
donts: Don't ship the vibe-coded AI aesthetic: big radii, glows, gradient text, pill buttons, cream backgrounds, generic SaaS landing energy.
Don't add anything toy-like or gamified: cartoon markers, confetti, badges — anything that undercuts the precision-instrument feel.
Don't use Signal Blue decoratively — no blue section headers, borders, or background washes.
Don't add drop shadows to lift surfaces (The Glass Over Shadow Rule).
Don't use display fonts, orchestrated page-load choreography, or custom scrollbars/form controls where native ones work.
